name: browserbase-mcp
title: Browserbase
summary: Quickly search the web and extract structured data from web pages or fully interact with the websites using headless browsers.
description: Quickly search the web and extract structured data from web pages or fully interact with the websites using headless browsers.

useCases.name: Web search and navigation
useCases.description: Open URLs, search, and move through multi-step web flows.

useCases.name: Actions and forms
useCases.description: Click, type, submit, and select with natural language to complete interactive workflows.

useCases.name: Structured data extraction
useCases.description: Pull prices, listings, tables, and article content from live pages.

useCases.name: Full site interaction
useCases.description: Reliably reach JavaScript-heavy, authenticated, and protected sites using headless browsers.

browserbaseBearerAuth.description: Authenticate with Browserbase using your Browserbase API key as a bearer token.
